escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion — RCE
escalations.exploit_scenario: Remote unauthenticated attacker sends crafted Handlebars template exploiting AST type confusion to execute arbitrary JavaScript on the backend server process.
escalations.impact: Remote Code Execution — full server compromise, data exfiltration, lateral movement
escalations.fix: npm update handlebars to >=4.7.9 in Source/Backend; consider package.json overrides

escalations.title: path-to-regexp Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in Orchestrator
escalations.exploit_scenario: Attacker sends single crafted HTTP request with malicious URL pattern, causing catastrophic regex backtracking that freezes the orchestrator process.
escalations.impact: Full orchestrator DoS — entire agent pipeline frozen, requiring process restart
escalations.fix: npm update path-to-regexp to >=0.1.13 in platform/orchestrator

backlog.title: brace-expansion Process Hang and Memory Exhaustion
backlog.fix: npm update brace-expansion to >=1.1.13 in Source/Backend
cross_refs: [CROSS-REF: red-teamer] Input validation on sequence parameters

backlog.title: Route handlers bypass service layer — 19 direct store calls
backlog.detail: All three route files call store.createWorkItem, store.findById, store.findAll, store.updateWorkItem, and store.softDelete directly. CLAUDE.md: 'No direct DB calls from route handlers'.
backlog.fix: Extract workItemService.ts; route handlers delegate to service functions only

backlog.title: GET /api/search not registered — 5 tests intentionally failing, DependencyPicker broken
backlog.detail: FR-dependency-search requires cross-entity typeahead. Route not implemented. 5 tests fail. DependencyPicker component broken at runtime.
backlog.fix: Create Source/Backend/src/routes/search.ts; register GET /api/search in app.ts; return {data: WorkItem[]}

backlog.title: dev-workflow-platform.md — 69 FRs (FR-001 to FR-069) with zero source coverage
backlog.detail: Full development workflow platform spec in active Specifications/ directory with no corresponding source implementation.
backlog.fix: Annotate unbuilt FRs as [PLANNED] OR move spec to Plans/ if not yet scheduled

backlog.title: OpenTelemetry distributed tracing absent — no @opentelemetry/* packages installed
backlog.detail: CLAUDE.md and FR-021 require OTel spans, traceparent header propagation, span IDs in logs. Logging and Prometheus present; tracing pillar completely missing.
backlog.fix: Install @opentelemetry/sdk-node, @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node; configure trace exporter; add spans in assessment.ts and router.ts

backlog.title: Vite path traversal in optimized deps .map handling (dev only)
backlog.fix: npm update vite to >=8.0.8 in Source/Frontend (major version bump required)

backlog.title: Outdated major versions: react 18, express 4, pino 8, uuid 9
backlog.fix: Plan major version upgrade sprint: react→19, express→5, pino→10, uuid→13

backlog.title: Traceability enforcer covers only 13/107 requirements — CI false-green
backlog.detail: Enforcer only checks FR-WF-001 to FR-WF-013. 94 requirements in dev-workflow-platform.md and tiered-merge-pipeline.md are invisible to it.
backlog.fix: Extend enforcer to scan Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md for FR-\d+ IDs

backlog.title: Logger always emits JSON — no dev pretty-printing (violates FR-003)
backlog.fix: Branch emit() on process.env.NODE_ENV: JSON in production, console.log in development

backlog.title: Duplicate test files at tests/ and tests/pages/ for 2 components
backlog.fix: Delete superseded copies; standardise on one test root (prefer tests/pages/)

backlog.title: eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps without justification (×2)
backlog.fix: Add justification comment OR fix the hook dependency correctly

backlog.title: ~2,800 transitive dependencies — large attack surface
backlog.fix: Quarterly dependency audit; consider removing unused direct dependencies

backlog.title: tiered-merge-pipeline.md FR-TMP-001–010 unimplemented (platform scope)
backlog.fix: Annotate as [platform-scope] or move reference to platform/ documentation

backlog.title: Two logger abstractions: src/logger.ts wraps src/utils/logger.ts
backlog.fix: Consolidate into single logger; extend utils/logger.ts to accept string|object; remove wrapper

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Unimplemented specs in active Specifications/ directory
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Annotate unbuilt specs as [PLANNED] or move to Plans/; extend enforcer scope
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Removes false-D on spec coverage; CI traceability becomes accurate

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add @opentelemetry/sdk-node + consolidate logger with NODE_ENV branching
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 findings; satisfies FR-021 and CLAUDE.md observability rules

cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm update handlebars brace-expansion in Source/Backend
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Eliminates P1 CVE and 1 P2 CVE with single update command

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Service layer bypass + missing search route
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Create workItemService.ts + searchRouter.ts; refactor route handlers to delegate
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Fixes 2 P2s; unblocks DependencyPicker UI and 5 failing tests

cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm update vite to >=8.0.8 in Source/Frontend
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 P3/P4 findings in one major-version upgrade
